views.supporting_formula_latex: \mathbf{H}_{\mathbf{X}}[f]=\nabla_{\mathbf{X}}\left[\left(\nabla_{\mathbf{X}}[f]\right)^{T}\right]=\frac{\partial^{2}f}{\partial\mathbf{x}\partial\mathbf{x}^{T}}=\left(\begin{array}{c c c}\frac{\partial^{2}f}{\partial x_{1}^{2}}&\cdots&\frac{\partial^{2}f}{\partial x_{1}\partial x_{n}}\\ \vdots&\ddots&\vdots\\ \frac{\partial^{2}f}{\partial x_{1}\partial x_{n}}&\cdots&\frac{\partial^{2}f}{\partial x_{n}^{2}}\end{array}\right)
